/X:COUNT 1, 288(C)1 PC FELONY OF THIS CASE, HAD BEEN DISCHARGED 871 PC ON 03-03-08, ON 03-19-08, THERE WAS A GRANTING OF CONSOLIDATION ON CT 2, 3,D 4 AND THE CHARGES WERE REMOVED FROM THIS CASE AND TRANSFERRED TO CASE #23358027, HOWEVER, THIS CASE HAVE BEEN TRAILING CASE #2358027,  CASE #23485 NEEDS EITHER TO BE DISMISSED OR THE CASE     NUMBER NEEDS TO BE ADDED ONTHE FIRST AMENDED FELONY COMPLAINT, I SPOKE    TO DA; MR, PANWALA, PD; TALKLEMENT AND JACQUE ABOUT THIS MATTER, AND THEY AGREED TO ADD THIS MATTER FOR DISCUSSION ON COUNT 2, 3, AND 4,  HOWEVER, MR, PANWALA WILL NOT BE THEREON 05-15-08 AND WILL HAVE ANOTHER DA MAKE A SPECIAL APPEARANCE,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/LD:05-05-08 (60 DAY)/X:NO MAYAN INT PRESENT TODAY,SPANISH INT EDWARD SILVA ASSISTING DEFENDANT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 3 AND 4 IS DENIED/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
